description: Lists BIM Model Revision Plans associated with the specified Project.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The compact view contains only ids.
The extended view contains the response shown below.
The normal view contains 'bim_plan_id' and 'bim_level_id' instead of objects.
The default view is normal.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[bim_plan_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching BIM Plan ids

parameters.name: filters[bim_model_revision_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching Bim Model Revision ids.

parameters.name: filters[bim_level_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching BIM Level ids

200.description: BIM Model Revision Plans listed successfully

403.description: User does not have permission to view BIM Model Revision Plans
